docsTargets.heading: ## Dashboard Screenshot
docsTargets.caption: The SQL Cockpit home dashboard with the main navigation and operator landing view.

docsTargets.heading: ## Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Estate Overview home page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Estate Overview is the SQL Cockpit home page and summarizes saved SQL Server instances, health, capacity, and SQL Agent risk.

docsTargets.heading: ## Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Instance Manager page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Instance Manager stores and tests reusable SQL Server instance profiles for server-level workflows.

docsTargets.heading: ## Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Connection Manager page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Connection Manager stores reusable database-level connection profiles and validates them against live SQL Server metadata.

docsTargets.heading: ## Server Explorer Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Server Explorer page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Server Explorer loads live SQL Server metadata so operators can browse databases, schemas, and objects from saved instance profiles.

docsTargets.heading: ## Server Explorer Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Server Explorer page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Use Server Explorer when you want to browse a live server and narrow the scope by one or more databases.

docsTargets.heading: ## Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: SQL Agent Manager page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: SQL Agent Manager loads live Agent jobs, schedules, and runtime history for the selected SQL Server instance.

docsTargets.heading: ## Fleet Screenshot
docsTargets.caption: Fleet gives operators a sync-row-oriented view for filtering and reviewing the current sync configuration estate.

docsTargets.heading: ## Inspector Screenshot
docsTargets.caption: Inspector focuses on one sync row and its detailed configuration, state, and related workflow context.

docsTargets.heading: ## Batch Copilot Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Batch Copilot page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Batch Copilot helps profile table shape and reason about safer BatchSize starting points.

docsTargets.heading: ## Bulk Intake Screenshot
docsTargets.alt: Bulk Intake page in SQL Cockpit
docsTargets.caption: Bulk Intake previews CSV imports before writing rows into Sync.TableConfig.
